title: The Gilded Door
description: A door of polished gold appears where no building stood yesterday. A voice beyond it promises that ambition has finally made you worthy to enter.

options.title: Enter the Door
options.description: Accept the invitation and discover what ambition earns.

options.title: Strip Away the Gold
options.description: A magical door is still made of something valuable.

options.title: Turn Away
options.description: Prove that wanting more does not mean accepting every price.
